common.backAria: Go back to the previous page

dateFilter.label: Posted on Reddit:
dateFilter.hint: Filters by the post’s original creation time on Reddit (not when it was analyzed here).
dateFilter.customInvalid: One or more dates are invalid.

reports.title: Reports
reports.pageTip: Historical confidence scores from stored base/final values and adjustment metadata.
reports.subtitle: Historical confidence score analytics based on stored base/final values and adjustment metadata.
reports.kpiHistoricalTip: Posts with stored base and final relevance scores.
reports.kpiAvgBaseTip: Mean base relevance score before adjustments.
reports.kpiAvgFinalTip: Mean final relevance score after adjustments.
reports.kpiAvgDeltaTip: Mean change between base and final scores.
reports.adjustmentImpactTip: How often scoring rules penalized or boosted posts.
reports.trendUsesRange: Daily trend uses the same Reddit post-date window as the filter above (not the “days” window).
reports.topAdjustedSortNote: Sorted by largest score adjustment (absolute delta).
reports.breakdownSectionHint: Counts use the same Reddit post date filter as above. Disaster type comes from humanitarian labels; region uses stored location metadata (country / province → TÜİK region) when present, otherwise a coarse coordinate-box estimate.
reports.sectionPostDateDesc: Daily post count (empty days are 0) and cumulative total (line).
reports.sectionRegionDesc: Distribution of posts by region (province/TÜİK first).
reports.pieByRegion: By region (province / TÜİK or coordinate estimate)

dashboard.tagline: Access disaster monitoring and analysis features
dashboard.modulesTip: Hover a tile for details. Badges show items waiting in moderation or complaint queues.
dashboard.featureModerationDesc: Review disaster candidates before they appear on the map
dashboard.featureTextAnalysisDesc: View analyzed social posts for disaster relevance
dashboard.featureMapDesc: Explore disaster-related posts on an interactive map
dashboard.featureAuthorsDesc: Trust scores and activity for contributors across sources
dashboard.featureReportsDesc: Historical score analytics, charts, and tables
dashboard.featureTeamDesc: Manage moderation team members and access
dashboard.featureProfileDesc: Manage your account settings and preferences
dashboard.locationsTip: Recent analyzed posts with extracted location text or stored coordinates.
dashboard.locationsSubtitle: Analyzed posts with extracted location text (from labeled lines in the post body) or stored coordinates
dashboard.locationsEmpty: No posts with extracted locations yet. When the parser finds location markers in the text, they appear here.

authors.title: Authors
authors.pageTip: Contributor stats and trust scores from ingested posts. Default sort: trust score, high to low.
authors.subtitle: Aggregated contributor statistics and trust scores from ingested posts (default sort: trust score, high to low). Additional sources can be merged here over time.
authors.totalAuthorsTip: Distinct Reddit authors with at least one ingested post.
authors.averageTrustTip: Mean trust score across all authors (0–100%).
authors.chartTrustTip: Five authors with the highest trust scores.
authors.chartPostsTip: Five authors with the most ingested posts.
authors.empty: No authors yet. They will appear as posts are ingested from connected sources.

map.title: Disaster Map
map.pageTip: Human-approved disaster posts on a map. Pin size reflects how many posts share a location.
map.subtitle: View disaster-related posts by location
map.mapFallbackNote: If map doesn't load, install Leaflet: npm install leaflet @types/leaflet
map.pinSizeInfo: Pin size reflects post count at that location
map.loadError: Could not load map data. Please try again.
map.dateFilterForPostLink: Opened with a post link: the post-date filter was set to all time so that post can appear on the map.
map.approvedOnlyNote: Only human-approved disaster-related posts are shown on the map.
map.managerReadOnlyNote: Read-only view for moderators — you cannot change map data here.

textAnalysis.title: Text analysis
textAnalysis.pageTip: Browse analyzed posts by relevance score. Open a post for the full triage checklist (disaster, help request, image checks).
textAnalysis.redditNotConfigured: Reddit OAuth is not configured — new posts cannot be fetched. Set up credentials in Integrations.
textAnalysis.subtitle: Browse analyzed posts by relevance score; open one for the full checklist.
textAnalysis.listUXHint: The list only shows the relevance score (how strongly the text matches a disaster-related pattern). Tap a title or “Full analysis” to see disaster vs not, help request, and image checks in order.
textAnalysis.statGroupPipelineTip: Ingestion and analysis pipeline counts for the current date filter.
textAnalysis.statGroupModerationTip: Human review outcomes and disaster-related totals.
textAnalysis.kpiTotalTip: All ingested posts matching the date filter.
textAnalysis.kpiPendingTip: Posts waiting for ML analysis or staff approval.
textAnalysis.kpiQueueTip: Disaster candidates awaiting human review — opens moderation.
textAnalysis.kpiApprovedTip: Human-approved disaster posts visible on the map.
textAnalysis.kpiDisasterTip: Posts flagged as disaster-related by analysis.
textAnalysis.detailReaderPath: Suggested order when triaging: (1) Is it disaster-related? (2) Is it a help request? (3) If there is an image, does it match the text and show plausible damage?
textAnalysis.detailPageTip: Suggested order when triaging: (1) Is it disaster-related? (2) Is it a help request? (3) If there is an image, does it match the text and show plausible damage?
textAnalysis.approvedOnlyNote: Only human-approved disaster-related posts are shown on the map.
textAnalysis.detailLoadError: Could not load post details. Please try again.
textAnalysis.sectionTextHint: Whether the post is about a disaster and how strong the signal is.
textAnalysis.sectionHumanitarianHint: Help requests and broad humanitarian tags (if available).
textAnalysis.sectionVisualHint: Caption vs. text consistency and visible damage cues from the image.
textAnalysis.visualCaptionPending: Not run or not applicable (e.g. low relevance or vision off).
textAnalysis.visualDamagePending: Not run or no damage signal yet.
textAnalysis.matchHintLowRelevance: Skipped when relevance is below the threshold.
textAnalysis.matchHintNa: Not analyzed yet, or vision is disabled.

moderation.title: Post moderation
moderation.pageTip: Review disaster candidates before they appear on the map. Shortcuts: j/k navigate, a approve, r reject.
moderation.subtitle: Review disaster candidates before they appear on the map and in reports. Non-candidates are not approved—they skip moderation and stay off disaster views.
moderation.emptyMine: Nothing assigned to you yet. Open the Unassigned pool, claim a post, then approve or reject it here.
moderation.emptyUnassigned: No unassigned posts in the pool right now.
moderation.kpiUnassignedTip: Posts waiting in the shared unassigned moderation pool.
moderation.kpiMineTip: Posts currently assigned to you for review.
moderation.workflowTip: 1) Open Unassigned pool → 2) Take for review → 3) Approve or reject in Assigned to me.
moderation.assignedToOther: This post is assigned to {{name}}. You cannot approve or reject it.
moderation.rejectNotesTip: Optional reason when rejecting — helps audit and author trust scoring.
moderation.rejectNotesPlaceholder: Why is this not a valid disaster report?
moderation.actionsHint: Approved posts appear on the map and in disaster reports. Rejected posts are excluded and lower the author's trust score.
moderation.actionsTip: Approved → visible on map. Rejected → hidden and lowers author trust.
moderation.actionFailed: Could not save decision. Try again.
moderation.keyboardHint: Shortcuts: j/k navigate, a approve, r reject
moderation.autoAdvance: Go to next item after decision
moderation.autoAdvanceTip: After approve or reject, automatically select the next post in the queue.
moderation.confirmReject: Reject this post? It will be hidden from the map and lower author trust.
moderation.claimBeforeDecide: Claim this post before you can approve or reject.

team.title: Moderation team
team.pageTip: Create manager accounts for queue review. Managers cannot self-register — only BASIC users can sign up publicly.
team.subtitle: Create manager accounts. Managers review the queue; they cannot self-register.
team.addHint: Managers log in with the email and password you set. Public registration remains BASIC only.

redditIntegration.title: Reddit integration
redditIntegration.pageTip: Connect your Reddit script app so the backend can fetch new posts. Reddit now requires OAuth — unauthenticated API calls return HTTP 403.
redditIntegration.formHint: Create a script app at reddit.com/prefs/apps. Leave secret/password blank to keep existing values.
redditIntegration.testFailed: Connection test failed. Check credentials and try again.
redditIntegration.fetchError: Fetch failed. Check Reddit settings first.
redditIntegration.setupTitle: How to get Reddit OAuth credentials
redditIntegration.setupIntro: Reddit no longer allows anonymous API access. You need a script-type app and the account credentials below.
redditIntegration.setupStep1: Sign in to Reddit and open reddit.com/prefs/apps.
redditIntegration.setupStep2: Scroll down and click “create another app…” (or “are you a developer? create an app…”).
redditIntegration.setupStep3: Choose type script — not web app or installed app.
redditIntegration.setupStep4: Fill in a name (e.g. Smart Disaster Hub) and redirect uri http://localhost:8080, then create the app.
redditIntegration.setupStep5: Copy the client ID (short string under the app name) and the secret field into the form on the left.
redditIntegration.setupStep6: Username / password: the Reddit account that owns this app (a dedicated bot account is recommended).
redditIntegration.setupStep7: User-Agent example: SmartDisasterHub/1.0 (by /u/your_username) — replace your_username with the Reddit username.
redditIntegration.setupStep8: Save → Test connection → Fetch now. New posts should appear in Text Analysis after ML analysis.
redditIntegration.setupMapClientId: Client ID → string under the app name on the prefs/apps page
redditIntegration.setupMapSecret: Client secret → secret field shown for the app
redditIntegration.setupMapPassword: Reddit password → password for that same account

complaints.submitPageTip: Report a problem, incorrect content, or account issue. Our team reviews it in the inbox.
complaints.submitSubtitle: Tell us about a problem, incorrect content, or account issue. Our team will review it in the inbox.
complaints.submitSuccess: Your complaint was sent. We will review it soon.
complaints.submitError: Could not send your complaint. Please try again.
complaints.subject: Subject
complaints.myComplaintsEmpty: You have not submitted any complaints yet.
complaints.inboxPageTip: Review user complaints, claim items, mark them resolved, and browse closed cases.
complaints.inboxSubtitle: Review user complaints, claim items, and mark them resolved.
complaints.inboxEmpty: No open complaints in this queue.
complaints.kpiUnassignedTip: Open complaints not yet assigned to staff.
complaints.kpiAllOpenTip: All active complaints (open or in progress).
complaints.assignedToOther: This complaint is assigned to another staff member.
complaints.resolveNotesTip: Optional note stored when resolving the complaint.

landing.heroSubtitle: Intelligent disaster detection and monitoring for emergency teams
landing.previewImage1Alt: Smart Disaster Hub overview: monitor, detect, verify, and coordinate on a live map
landing.previewImage2Alt: Response teams using maps and devices in the field during a disaster
landing.previewImage2Caption: Dashboards and location intelligence for coordination in the field
landing.hoverHint: Tap the upper or lower area to preview the visuals

footer.tagline: Smarter data, faster decisions, safer communities.

authActivation.mailSentSubtitle: Please check your inbox and click the activation link before signing in.
authActivation.activatingSubtitle: Please wait while we verify your email.
authActivation.successBody: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.

aboutPage.loadError: Failed to load about content. Please try again later.
aboutPage.missionText: Smart Disaster Hub is an intelligent disaster detection and monitoring system designed to help communities and organizations stay informed about disaster-related events in real-time. Our platform leverages advanced machine learning algorithms to analyze social media content and identify disaster-related information, enabling faster response times and better preparedness.
aboutPage.howText: The system continuously monitors Reddit posts from disaster-related communities, collecting and analyzing content using natural language processing and machine learning techniques. Each post is automatically evaluated for disaster relevance, categorized, and displayed on an interactive map that visualizes disaster activity by location.
aboutPage.featureAutoText: The system automatically fetches and processes Reddit posts every 15 minutes, ensuring you always have access to the latest disaster-related information.
aboutPage.featureAiText: Advanced machine learning models analyze each post to determine disaster relevance and provide relevance scores, helping you identify the most critical information quickly.
aboutPage.featureMapText: Explore disaster-related posts on an interactive map that shows activity by geographic location, making it easy to understand disaster patterns and trends.
aboutPage.featureAnalyticsText: Access detailed statistics and filtering options to analyze disaster data, track trends, and generate insights that support decision-making.
aboutPage.purposeText: Smart Disaster Hub aims to bridge the gap between disaster information and those who need it most. By automating the collection and analysis of disaster-related content, we help emergency responders, government agencies, and communities make informed decisions quickly. Our platform transforms raw social media data into actionable intelligence, enabling faster response times and potentially saving lives.
aboutPage.techText: Built with modern web technologies and powered by machine learning, Smart Disaster Hub combines the reliability of traditional monitoring systems with the speed and reach of social media platforms. Our system processes information in real-time, ensuring that critical disaster information is available when it matters most.
